name: Satellite Tip
text1: A satellite image analyst flagged unusual thermal signatures at a remote industrial site. The report was filed with ISIA but sat in queue for three weeks before inspection was scheduled.
text2: A whistleblower inside a logistics firm passed coordinates of an undeclared site to a journalist. The story ran before ISIA could act. The site was evacuated and hardware dispersed before inspectors arrived.
image-prompt: A satellite photo on a monitor showing a remote industrial complex with heat bloom overlays, an analyst's hand pointing at the screen in a darkened intelligence operations room, tense focused atmosphere, digital painting, no text
